wins_analysis: No wins today. Zero targets were hit, consistent with taking counter-trend BUY trades in a confirmed downtrend regime.
losses_analysis: The 1 executed trade (likely from a prior day's pending order) was a BUY in a trending_down regime with Nifty -0.8%. All 3 AI recommendations had 0% probability scores, indicating the model itself had zero confidence. The system placed 2 orders despite the hard-block rule being explicitly stated, suggesting either the rule was not enforced in code or pending orders from prior days were not cancelled at regime change.
regime_impact: The trending_down regime with Nifty -0.8% and ADX 25 made all BUY/demand-zone setups toxic. No supply-zone SHORT setups were available, making this a textbook NO-TRADE day. The regime directly caused the loss — counter-trend trades in strong downtrends have near-zero edge.

improvements.action: Implement hard code block: if regime == 'trending_down' AND nifty_change < -0.5%, reject ALL BUY order placements and cancel any existing pending BUY orders immediately at scan time
improvements.reason: Today 2 BUY orders were placed despite the report itself acknowledging the hard-block rule should have prevented them. The rule exists in learnings but is not enforced in execution logic.

improvements.action: Add a minimum AI probability threshold of 40% — never place orders when AI probability is 0%
improvements.reason: All 3 recommendations today had 0% AI probability, meaning the model itself predicted zero chance of success. Placing orders on 0% probability signals is guaranteed value destruction.

improvements.action: Implement NO-TRADE day declaration: if all detected setups conflict with regime AND no aligned setups exist, place zero orders and log as forced skip
improvements.reason: Today's report correctly identified this as a NO-TRADE day in its narrative but still placed 2 orders. The logic must be automated, not advisory.

improvements.action: Add end-of-day cleanup: cancel all pending orders that have not triggered by 14:30 IST, especially if regime has shifted adversely since order placement
improvements.reason: 2 orders remained pending at close, tying up capital allocation and risking gap-down fills tomorrow morning in a continuing downtrend.

improvements.action: For tomorrow, only scan for SHORT/supply-zone setups on stocks with relative weakness (underperforming Nifty) — specifically look at banking names like ICICIBANK and KOTAKBANK which showed demand-zone setups today (implying they were falling into demand, meaning supply pressure is dominant)
improvements.reason: ICICIBANK and KOTAKBANK appearing as BUY candidates in a downtrend suggests they are falling — flip perspective and look for short entries on bounces to supply zones.

tomorrow_focus: If downtrend continues (ADX >22, Nifty negative), only take SHORT/supply-zone setups or declare NO-TRADE; cancel the 2 pending BUY orders on ITC and KOTAKBANK immediately at pre-market.

symbol_notes.ITC: Pending BUY order at 280.30 must be cancelled pre-market — counter-trend in downtrend with 0% AI probability
symbol_notes.KOTAKBANK: Pending BUY order at 382.40 must be cancelled pre-market — same reasoning, banking sector weak
symbol_notes.ICICIBANK: Watch for supply-zone SHORT setup if it bounces to resistance near 1,276-1,280 area
